REMITTITUR FILED A MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT PURSUANT TO RULE 104, C R C HAS NOT BEEN FILED WITHIN 10 DAYS OF SAID SERVICE OF THE NOTICE OF DEFAULT; THEREFORE IT IS ORDERED BY THE COURT THAT THE APPEAL IS DISMISSED PURSUANT TO RULE 133 (C).

JUDGE DIANE WICK; CLERK - BETH WILBER; REPORTER - BRENDA FIELDS: C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. MICHAEL ROSSOFF APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF, RICHARD HURLBURT APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES A JURY IN OPEN COURT AND CASE PROCEEDS AS A COURT TRIAL. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT CALL WITNESSES; TESTIMONY IS GIVEN; AND EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT REST & CASE IS SUBMITTED.
